{{Company | Name=Play Orange | Guid=3010-26405 | Deck=Play Orange was founded in 2007 as a games distributor and developer and has since established itself as a popular alternative to other digital games retailers. | FoundedDate=2006-01-01 | Address=Zur Linde 7 | City=Wilsdruff | State=Germany | Website=http://play-orange.com | Characters= | Concepts= | Developed_games=Games/Gesellige_Spiele,Games/Melinda_Wind,Games/Spuk_im_Wirtshaus | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Published_games=Games/Absolute_Asse_raus,Games/Absolute_Canasta,Games/Absolute_Doppelkopf,Games/Absolute_Kreuzwortratsel,Games/Absolute_Poker,Games/Absolute_Romme,Games/Absolute_Schafkopf,Games/Absolute_Skat,Games/Avencast_Rise_of_the_Mage,Games/Chrome_SpecForce,Games/Das_Geheimnis_der_agyptischen_Mumie,Games/Das_Herz_von_Afrika,Games/Das_Ratsel_in_Rom,Games/Das_Ratsel_um_Gallien,Games/Dr_Tool_Gehirn_Trainer,Games/Gesellige_Spiele,Games/Harrys_Restaurant,Games/Hollische_Nachbarn,Games/Melinda_Wind,Games/Packs_Mega_Sammlung,Games/Pranksterz_Wie_argere_ich_meinen_Nachbarn,Games/Schatten_der_Dammerung,Games/Speedway_League,Games/Spuk_im_Wirtshaus,Games/The_Legend_of_Ra,Games/Xpand_Rally | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/10/101045/3772720-logo_invoice-1752250572.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3772720-logo_invoice-1752250572.png","path":"10\/101045\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_super,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> '''Overview''' Play Orange is a developer of casual games and a provider of digital distribution services.

revision.comment: Initial creation of the developer profile for Roman Yakimovicz
revision.text:
{{Company |Guid=4c7c4706-e89f-4bf6-a184-5bb4e8458b02 |Name=Roman Yakimovicz |Deck=Roman Yakimovicz is an independent video game developer focused on creating minimalist logic and puzzle games, most notably the daily browser challenge Jigsudo |FoundedDate=2026-01-01 |Website=https://github.com/ryakimovicz }} Roman Yakimovicz is a solo independent developer based in Argentina. His development philosophy focuses on creating clean, minimalist, and intellectually stimulating experiences that can be accessed across multiple platforms through web technology.
His debut project, Jigsudo, is a Web App that combines elements of memory games, pattern recognition, and Sudoku into an interconnected daily challenge. Roman prioritizes accessible design and consistent mental engagement, aiming to provide players with a seamless "active meditation" through logical puzzle solving.
